title: adonis aestivalis var. provincialis
intro: Adonis aestivalis var. provincialis, also known as the Adonis or Pheasant's Eye, is a rare and beautiful plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family, characterized by its vibrant red and white flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Adonis aestivalis var. provincialis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Adonis aestivalis var. provincialis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots, leaves, or flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
